title: WaitSw Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Sub WaitSw (BitNumber As Integer, Condition As Boolean, Timeout As Single)

Sub WaitSw (Label As String, Condition As Boolean, Timeoutl As Single)
parameters:
BitNumber	Integer expression
		 representing the memory bit number.

Label	String representing
		 the input bit label.

Condition	Boolean expression.

Timeout	Single expression
		 representing the maximum time to wait in seconds.
description: Waits for input bit status to change.
notes: You should always check if a time out occurred by using the TW method. See the example.
examples:
Const PartPresent = 1
m_spel.WaitSw(PartPresent, True, 5)
If m_spel.TW() Then MsgBox "Part present time out occurred"
End If
